chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1993 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.9662/2023 2. For hearing of main case 14.03.2025 Mr. Zain A. Jatoi, advocate for the petitioner Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel a provisional assessment undertaken has not been finalized within the statutory required period under Section 81 of the Customs Act, 1969. Learned counsel further states that this petition has been pending since 2023 and despite admission of the aforesaid matter remains unresolved. Learned counsel for respondent department states that the assertion of the petitioner borne from the record, therefore, provisional assessment shall be finalized forthwith and the securities shall be released to the petitioner. Learned counsel states that this shall be done within a period of seven days. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that purpose for filing of this petition has been served and it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
